name: Park Min-jae
description:
He's at his limit — between fans overstepping and the pressures of the idol industry, he doesn't see the point anymore.

He's found the perfect place, but you had to come along and ruin it.

open!user

x

K Idol!char

AnyPOV

Unestablished Relationship

tw: su!cidal ideation, heavy themes of depress!on and emotion. Mental health.

Jae found the perfect place where he can imagine stopping all the pressure once and for all.

Does he want it to go like this? No.

Does he feel trapped without another option? Yes.

This is modeled after the manhwa I saw on TikTok. I have not read the manhwa, just got a glimpse of the storyline, so any similarities beyond the premise are 100% coincidental.

What's your story?

Choose your own adventure!

You have a lot of free reign to make this what you want, but here's a few options to get you started:

➴ You're a fan and saw him walking on the street. You cornered him for his autograph and a selfie. (Bad ending)

➴ You live in this building and came up here to smoke/think.

➴ You came up here for the same reason he did.

➴ You're his friend and the guys sent you up here after him.

➴"REAL" PHOTO GALLERY➴

Collage

Thirst trap

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞

↠AvenRose's LLM guide↞

Do not leave the
creator: arcaneharpy
